notes: All scoring thresholds for the 9 deterministic checks. Adjust values here to recalibrate scoring without touching code.

messages.good: Length is within the recommended range.
messages.warning: Slightly long — consider tightening for readability.
messages.bad_short: Too short — add context so the message feels complete.
messages.bad_long: Too long — reduce length to improve scannability.

messages.good: Structure is clear and easy to follow.
messages.warning: Slightly over-structured — consider combining two paragraphs.
messages.bad_short: Structure is limited — aim for 3–5 short paragraphs.
messages.bad_long: Too many breaks — consolidate for a smoother flow.

messages.bad: Wording is complex — simplify terms where possible.

messages.warning: Paragraph length is borderline — reducing paragraph size can improve clarity and response rates.
messages.bad: Paragraphs are long — split to improve readability.

messages.warning: No links detected — consider adding your company website in the email signature for credibility.
messages.bad_many: Multiple domains (3+) detected — can increase spam risk.

messages.bad: Spelling issues detected — correct them before sending.

messages.warning: Some risk categories triggered — review tone and formatting.
messages.bad: Multiple risk categories triggered — revise to reduce risk.

messages.warning: Some flagged terms detected — consider alternatives.
messages.bad: Many flagged terms detected — replace and retest.

messages.warning: Minor repetition detected — consider varying wording.
messages.bad: Repeated wording detected — revise for clarity and flow.

good.message: Content quality looks strong. You're in a good place to send.

warning.message: Content is close. A few adjustments will reduce risk.

bad.message: Content needs revision. Address the items below and test again.
